title: colubrina mystacina
intro: Colubrina mystacina, also known as Māmaki, is a native New Zealand tree species with edible leaves. Traditionally, its leaves have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Māmaki leaves include improving cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Māmaki leaves can be consumed as a tea or supplement, often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
